results.title: International Monetary Fund | April 2026 - Global Economy Tested Again
10 Charts To Address Concerns On 2026 Geopolitical Conflict
Stock Market Outlook 2026: Political Risks Loom | Morgan Stanley
Equities hit records as geopolitical risks linger | IG International
War Darkens Global Economic Outlook | IMF

results.summary: Middle East conflict (Strait of Hormuz disruption, energy crisis risk) is primary flashpoint. US involvement in Venezuela, NATO activity in Greenland, civil unrest in Iran. IMF forecasts global growth 3.1% and headline inflation 4.4% for 2026. Iran peace proposal on May 1 reduced risk premium slightly. Tariff uncertainty adds to volatility.
